channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped building waste, 13th March
item.description:
Dumped building waste that is blocking access for wheelchairs or prams

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartslock Drive, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various fly tips., 13th March
item.description:
Furniture bear Sainsbury’s Rubbish near bin from foxes Broken bike near south west entrance away from Sainsbury’s

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: 2 items on the Rochester Way grass bank between Wendover and the new builds, 13th March
item.description:
2 items on the Rochester way grass bank between Wendover and the new builds. Nearer to the new builds.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Camm Path, Kidbrooke

item.title: Bag of household rubbish left on pavement overnight, 13th March

The foxes have been at it.

item.title: Street light not working again., 13th March
item.description:
Dark as drive into close as light not working again and hasn’t for a few weeks. Please visit and fix
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Appledore Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Meter wide pot hole /, 13th March
item.description:
Please inspect and fix the road surface. It’s damaging cars tyres with surface crumbled away. The whole close needs resurfacing but this particular corner in close is awful. It’s been like this for a long time and still not fixed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Appledore Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping on Badgemore Path, 13th March
item.description:
Furniture and huge back of rubbish dumped. Address left in parcel in bag of rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sheldon road, 13th March
item.description:
Cloths left next to 18 Anson Road on its Sheldon Road side

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anson Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Tree leaning over after high winds, 13th March
item.description:
Tree outside 53 Roydene Road has started to lean over due to high winds. Starting to come up from pavement as well

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roydene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
